name: hero-city-theme
description: Verify the whole game uses the Hero City anime-action palette, lighting, world signage, HUD typography, comic accents, and responsive menu language.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local p=require(game.ReplicatedStorage.PolishConfig) local titles={} local parts=0 for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") then parts+=1 elseif d:IsA("TextLabel") and (d.Text:find("HERO",1,true) or d.Text:find("SIDEKICK",1,true)) then table.insert(titles,d.Text) end end local L=game.Lighting local color=L:FindFirstChild("Hero City Color") local atmosphere=L:FindFirstChild("Hero City Atmosphere") return H:JSONEncode({theme=p.StyleName,rootTheme=root:GetAttribute("Theme"),direction=root:GetAttribute("VisualDirection"),brickTheme=root.Walls["Brick Wall"]:GetAttribute("Theme"),parts=parts,bloom=L:FindFirstChild("Hero City Bloom")~=nil,color=color~=nil,saturation=color and color.Saturation or -1,atmosphere=atmosphere~=nil,density=atmosphere and atmosphere.Density or -1,heroRed=string.format("%d,%d,%d",p.Palette.HeroRed.R*255,p.Palette.HeroRed.G*255,p.Palette.HeroRed.B*255),heroCyan=string.format("%d,%d,%d",p.Palette.HeroCyan.R*255,p.Palette.HeroCyan.G*255,p.Palette.HeroCyan.B*255),heroYellow=string.format("%d,%d,%d",p.Palette.HeroYellow.R*255,p.Palette.HeroYellow.G*255,p.Palette.HeroYellow.B*255),titles=titles})

steps.label: world palette lighting and hero signage pass

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local U=game:GetService("UserInputService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Tasks") task.wait(.35) local accents=0 local labels={} for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d.Name=="HeroAccent" then accents+=1 end if d:IsA("TextLabel") and d.Text:find("HERO",1,true) then table.insert(labels,d.Text) end end local compact=U.TouchEnabled or workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize.Y<520 local titleResponsive=g.StatsPanel.Title.Visible==not compact return H:JSONEncode({theme=g:GetAttribute("Theme"),title=g.StatsPanel.Title.Text,banner=g.GameMenu.Content:FindFirstChild("Hero City Generated Banner")~=nil,accents=accents,labels=labels,titleResponsive=titleResponsive,modal=g.GameMenu.Visible and not g.StatsPanel.Visible and not g.MenuButton.Visible and not g.MobileControls.Visible})

steps.label: Hero City HUD menu and responsive comic accents pass
